onFilesDrop.description: Called when files are dropped on the dropzone.
onFilesDrop.detailedType:
| ((
    files: File[],
    event: DragEvent<HTMLDivElement>,
  ) => void)
| undefined

onOpen.description: Called when the dropzone is activated by click or keyboard.

className.description:
CSS class applied to the element, or a function that
returns a class based on the component’s state.

render.description:
Allows you to replace the component’s HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
render.detailedType:
| ReactElement
| ((
    props: HTMLProps,
    state: Dropzone.State,
  ) => ReactElement)

data-dragging.description: Present when files are being dragged over the dropzone.

data-disabled.description: Present when the dropzone is disabled.
